source_note: Arizona Corporation Commission order in the Arizona Public Service Company (APS) general rate case, Docket No. E-01345A-03-0437 (178 pp; scanned cover with a born-digital body — the parties/appearances list and findings carry a text layer). Posted on the ACC Utilities Division site as 'APS-FinalOrder.pdf'. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Arizona Corporation Commission (www.azcc.gov/divisions/utilities/electric/APS-FinalOrder.pdf).
